titleStmt.title: SII 16.60: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 60. (A.R. No. 335 of 1915.) CHĒJERLA, NARASAROWPET TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the maṇḍapa in the Kapōtēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1440 (current), Iśvara, Jyēshṭha ba. [30], Friday, solar eclipse, corresponding to 1517 A.D., June 19.

Registers a gift of 12 puṭṭis measured by the peddapāṭinagari-aṁbāram and 12 varāhas, to Namaśśivāya, the Śrīkaraṇa of god Kapōtēśvara by Sāḷuva Timmarasa at the command of the king for the merit of his family. The Sanskrit verse with which the record begins, refers to Chēṁjerla as the sarvamānya-agrahāra. Also records the remission of certain levies and specifies the quantities of rice, dhall, ghee, etc., for the daily use in the temple as well as the shares of the offerings to the various officials and temple servants including the Śrīkaraṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . sētussīta
sumēru rakṣitamahīṁ
śrīkṛṣṇarāya
dhatta śrī[cēruje¨rla]grāma
[sa¨rvva]mā
nyāgrahāraṁ kalata
rājyasthānapadēṣu vihitā
bhiṣēkaḥ śivāyai ta
ka dharmasēvitamatiḥ śrī
sāḷva tiṁmōniśaṁ . svasti
śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1440
Agunēṁṭi [Ī]śvarasaṁvva
tsara jyēṣṭa ba30 śu nāṁṭi
sūryagrahaṇa puṇyakā
lānanu śrīrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapra
tāpa śrī kṛṣṇadēvarāya
mahārāyala Āgñasu
śrī sāḷvatiṁmarusa
yyaṁgāru tamakulakō
ṭikiṁ buṇyaṁgānu
cēṁje¨rlla
grāmāna ma

śrīkapōtēśvara
śrīmaṁnmahā
dēUni nijamū
labhṛtyulaina śrīma
hāsthāna śrīdēva
dēva śrīsaṁmukha
śrīkaraṇa śrīnama
śśivāyaṁgāri
va¨rṣava ¨rttana pedda
pāṭni nagari Aṁbā
raṁvalna kha 12 nnu
rokhālavalna
varahālu va 12 nnu
Istimi Icci praja
la Āvēdanalu naga
ru muṭṭi vaccē Asa
bāvālu gollā
kārālu kaṭnaṁgā
nikelu mōdalaina
catrisāvēdanalu
ṁnu mānitimi . ka
riṇike mēra puṭṭitū
mulu braṁhmāpu
ri dēvadūmulu
vārikṣētrālu mā
nyaṁ dēvuni dinadina na
maśivunivāri prati
va ¨rttanaluṁnu mānyā
luṁnu Ācaṁdrā¨rka
mulu . yī puṇyā
naku yevvarevvarainā
nu mammu manniṁci ta
ppaka naḍapēdi . tappi
tirā gaṁggaka¨rta gōvu
brāṁhmanalanu
pāna bōvuvāru

śrīkapōtēśvara
dēvara naivēdya kaṭṭaḍa
biyyaṁ pedda kha 0 2
pesalu 0 . neyir 1 nū
ne dīpārādhanaku 5
guggilaṁ pa 4 pōṁkalu
50 Ākulu 200 Iṁ
duvalna sagaṁ prasādaṁ
pūjakulu . guḍiśi
ṣṭu . Āśramavāsulu
peddalu namaḥśivā
yavāru . vūḍigāla
vāruṁ gūḍā sagaṁ . śrī
mēghāla mallaya . Iṣṭa
kāmēśvara Utsavadēva .
viṣṇu . bhairava . kumārasvā
mulu . Okkokkadēvaraku
sāge . biyyaṁ 0 Ö 2 .
pesalu . Ö 0 . nēI Ö 0 . Adhika
va¨rtana varahālu va 12
yā kramāna karaṇa . dīpa
[3 .] sthānikulu grāmama
ṁdunu yekkōlaṁ dīni
phalaṁ svāmi bhāgyā
naṁ galugu Āyākā
laṁ dīni dēvatāvrayālu
yēṁṭēṁṭi va¨rttana vrayā
lu Ucita vrayālu sama
naḍapēdi yekkuvagu
nāḍu dīṁni cēru U
ṁsēsēdi . Ēkaiva
bhaginī lōkē sarvē
ṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ na
bhōjyā na karagrāhyā
dēva dattāvasuṁdharā .
Digital edition of SII 16.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
